title: Galt Sparkle Jewellery - Childrens Necklace and Bracelet Making, Craft Kit for Kids - Fun Activity Pack with Colourful Beads and Stickers, Encourages Creativity and Motor Skills - Ages 5 Years Plus
features: CREATE SPARKLY JEWELLERY: Combine glitter and pearlescent beads with the picture beads on silky cord to make necklaces, or add cool beads and holographic stickers to elastic to make fun bracelets
ARTS AND CRAFTS SET: The bracelet making kit includes 25 round, heart and flower picture beads, holographic stickers, 20 heart beads, 20 star beads, 120 round beads, silky cord, elastic and guide
LEARNING MADE FUN: Watch your children be inspired with the jewellery making kit, The kids craft kit encourages self-expression, innovation and creativity, and helps to improve fine motor skills
ACTIVITY PACK RANGE: Explore the world of arts and crafts for kids with Galt Toys Activity Packs, These imaginative children’s craft kits include all the materials to inspire any budding artist
CRAFT KIT FOR KIDS AGES 5 PLUS: Designed with little hands in mind, Ideal for party bag fillers for ages 5 years plus, watch your children enhance their motor skills in a fun and engaging way
description: From the manufacturer Galt Creative Activity Kits for Kids Explore the creative world of arts and crafts for kids with the Activity Pack range from Galt. These imaginative children’s craft kits include all the materials you need to inspire any budding artist, whether they enjoy classic crafts such as painting, pottery or sewing, or contemporary jewellery making and foil art. Each Galt children’s craft set encourages self-expression, innovation and creativity, as well as helping to improve fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, decision making and problem-solving skills. They’re the ideal birthday party gift or fun rainy-day activity for children. Fun-Filled Craft Kits for Kids Showcase Your Style with our Jewellery Craft Kit Create dazzling accessories with Sparkle Jewellery from Galt. This shimmering necklace and bracelet making kit contains sparkly picture beads with holographic stickers, glitter and pearlescent beads, an easy-to-follow guide, plus so much more so the fun can begin as soon as your young crafter opens the box. Get Creative with Children’s Crafts Sparkle Jewellery is a perfect introduction to the world of arts and crafts for children. With these beginner-level craft kits your young artist is sure to be engaged and entertained as they put their imaginations to the test. Activity Packs are also incredibly versatile, making ideal party bag fillers, travel toys, and wedding favours for kids. Fantastic First Crafts for Children Galt kids craft kits are a fantastic way to boost confidence, as your young crafter gets to not only have fun while learning, but they can also share their beautiful creations with friends and family. The Sparkle Jewellery kids craft pack also aids the development of hand-eye coordination, focus and the ability to think creatively.
